## Decision Gate

- [ ] Stakeholder list validated with 2-3 external sources
- [ ] Classifications defensible
- [ ] Each executor classification cites at least one source
- [ ] Executors defined functionally with possible titles listed
- [ ] At least one job executor identified
- [ ] Critical dependencies cite at least one source each
- [ ] Cross-dependencies mapped
- [ ] Executor selection scores reference Phase 1 evidence
